creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
@wonderfulbeef_ @provacuno showed us how wonderful European beef is! 

We attended a cocktail gala showcasing the high-quality European beef from Spain at Ergo Bar & Restaurant. 

Michelin-starred chef @miguelangeldelacruzgarcia and award-winning chef @fernandodelcerro prepared signature recipes. We’re so lucky to witness it firsthand, and have the first taste as well! 

The dishes were delicious and uniquely presented; highlighted with the tender, succulent, and perfect taste of the wonderful European beef!

Campaign financed with aid of the European Union.
